content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — login-gated app (LoginView.swift SecureField) but demo credentials/notes are placeholders: demo_user.txt=`test`, demo_password.txt=`changeme`, notes.txt=`TBD`.
Pierre: App Review must be able to sign in and reach your core features, or they will reject for incomplete information. Your demo account uses placeholder values (`test`/`changeme`) and the notes just say `TBD`, so a reviewer cannot actually log in or know how to exercise the app. Replace these with a real working account and step-by-step notes explaining how to reach the main functionality (paywall, gated screens, etc.).
